subject: Physical AI, nuovi funding e trend robotics | Ed. #1
preheader: 1 nuovi round di funding, trend AI e opportunità di investimento

headline.title: Yann LeCun’s AMI Labs raises $1.03 billion to build world models
headline.description: AMI Labs, the new venture cofounded by Turing Prize winner Yann LeCun after he left Meta, has raised $1.03 billion at a $3.5 billion pre-money valuation....

news.title: OpenAI and Google employees rush to Anthropic’s defense in DOD lawsuit
news.description: More than 30 OpenAI and Google DeepMind employees signed onto a statement supporting Anthropic's lawsuit against the Defense Department after the agency labeled the AI firm a supply-chain risk, according to court filings....

news.title: Anthropic launches code review tool to check flood of AI-generated code
news.description: Anthropic launched Code Review in Claude Code, a multi-agent system that automatically analyzes AI-generated code, flags logic errors, and helps enterprise developers manage the growing volume of code produced with AI....

news.title: OpenAI acquires Promptfoo to secure its AI agents
news.description: This deal underscores how frontier labs are scrambling to prove their technology can be used safely in critical business operations....
